potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow users to personalize their account and change their password.
The system shall enable the shipment of products/services to clients.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall provide a personalized profile for each user.
The system shall allow users to personalize their account and change their password.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Profile changes – each user can personalize their account, and change their password.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall enable clients to post project requests with requirements for BPO organizations.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Post project request – clients post their request with requirements for BPO organizations to choose from.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall allow BPO organizations to search and respond to client project requests.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Search project requests – BPO organizations can search and respond to the requests.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall enable the transfer of documents required by BPO organizations through the system.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Upload source documents – the documents required by the BPO organization can be transferred through the system, and the receiver can download them.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall provide progress updates to clients on work being done.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Check progress – clients should be constantly updated with the progress of the work.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall allow clients to check their product and quote modifications.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Quality check and testing – the clients can check their product and quote any modifications.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall enable BPO organizations to upload their products/services for further procedure.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Upload product/service – BPO organization should upload their product/service for the further procedure (payment, shipment, etc.).

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall facilitate payment from clients to BPO organizations at the end of agreements.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Payment – clients should pay the BPO organization at the end of their agreement.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The system shall enable the shipment of products/services to clients.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: Shipment – the product/service should be delivered to the clients.

Source text:
<<<
Login – provides a personalized profile for each user, to ensure security. Profile changes – each user
can personalize their account, and change their password. Post project request – clients post their
request with requirements for BPO organizations to choose from. Search project requests – BPO
organizations can search and respond to the requests. Upload source documents – the documents
required by the BPO organization can be transferred through the system, and the receiver can
download them. Check progress – clients should be constantly updated with the progress of the
work. Quality check and testing – the clients can check their product and quote any modifications. Upload product/service – BPO organization should upload their product/service for the
further procedure (payment, shipment, etc.). Payment – clients should pay the BPO organization
at the end of their agreement. Shipment – the product/service should be delivered to the clients.
Rating – the clients can rate the service provided by the BPO organization
>>>

    "The system shall enable the transfer of documents required by BPO organizations through the system.",
    "The system shall provide progress updates to clients on work being done.",
    "The system shall allow clients to check their product and quote modifications.",
    "The system shall enable BPO organizations to upload their products/services for further procedure.",
    "The system shall facilitate payment from clients to BPO organizations at the end of agreements.",
    "The system shall enable the shipment of products/services to clients.",
    "The system shall allow clients to rate the service provided by BPO organizations."
  ]
}
